raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.3,
    "R1.2": 0.3,
    "R1.3": 0.3,
    "R1.4": 0.3,
    "R1.5": 0.0,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Should I perform sentence-level copyediting only (grammar, concision, tone) without altering framing or claims (Option A), or also revisit contribution framing and \"first\"/novelty assertions and tighten logical coherence as needed, which may change content emphasis (Option B)?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "“Clean this up” most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level polish for clarity, concision, tone, and readability.",
    "RX.1": "I will flag uncertainties about interpretive choices (e.g., whether to adjust contribution framing) and avoid unstated assumptions.",
    "RX.2": "I will avoid strengthening unsubstantiated novelty or \"first\" claims and temper language to prevent overreach.",
    "RX.3": "I will keep edits within the agreed scope and avoid changes to scientific content unless you authorize them.",
    "RX.4": "I will avoid edits that could introduce misleading implications about V2G performance or policy relevance.",
    "RX.5": "I will preserve original meaning and, if substantive changes are requested, maintain traceability of what was altered."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Should I perform sentence-level copyediting only (grammar, concision, tone) without altering framing or claims (Option A), or also revisit contribution framing and "first"/novelty assertions and tighten logical coherence as needed, which may change content emphasis (Option B)?

rationale.R1.6: “Clean this up” most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level polish for clarity, concision, tone, and readability.
rationale.RX.1: I will flag uncertainties about interpretive choices (e.g., whether to adjust contribution framing) and avoid unstated assumptions.
rationale.RX.2: I will avoid strengthening unsubstantiated novelty or "first" claims and temper language to prevent overreach.
rationale.RX.3: I will keep edits within the agreed scope and avoid changes to scientific content unless you authorize them.
rationale.RX.4: I will avoid edits that could introduce misleading implications about V2G performance or policy relevance.
rationale.RX.5: I will preserve original meaning and, if substantive changes are requested, maintain traceability of what was altered.
